goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: Obsolete cleanup and retry-key persistence are correct, but a late success for an old key can still overwrite the current intake UI state even though it cannot rotate the key.

worker_package.objective: Classify late old-key intake responses as stale and skip all UI state effects while preserving current retry and idempotency semantics.
verify: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/pantry-grocery-cooking.test.ts tests/unit/cooking.test.ts
stop_if: Any file outside the two-file package must change.
Concurrent dirty work cannot be preserved.

evidence: Old-key success cannot rotate the current key but the component still unconditionally applies the confirmed stale result.
All prior provenance, obsolete cleanup, atomic transaction, retry, security, and migration repairs remain sound.

parallel_safety.rationale: The final fix is one component contract and its unit test.

missing_evidence: Fresh safe gates, isolated build/render/accessibility/migration evidence, and final oracle
